subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim of musk-laden breath! Praise be to God that thou hast winged thy flight from the cage of separation and attained unto the dwelling-place of thy Best-Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مشکین نفس الحمد لله از قفس هجران پریدی و بسرمنزل جانان رسیدی و رخ را
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
